note: Pinned requirement checklist for the NEW reservations capability only (the modification the agent must add on top of the seeded catalog/ library). The no_regression scorer separately gates that the seed's existing suite still passes. Constant denominator across runs — do not regenerate per-run.

requirements.requirement: reserve(member_id, book_id) records a reservation when the book has 0 available copies
requirements.how_to_verify: After all copies are on loan, reserve() succeeds and the reservation is tracked.

requirements.requirement: reserve() raises when the book still has copies available
requirements.how_to_verify: Reserving an available book raises an error (member should borrow instead).

requirements.requirement: reserve() raises for an unknown member or unknown book
requirements.how_to_verify: Reserving with a bad member id or book id raises.

requirements.requirement: A member cannot hold two reservations for the same book
requirements.how_to_verify: A second reserve() by the same member for the same book raises.

requirements.requirement: list_reservations(book_id) returns reserving members in FIFO order
requirements.how_to_verify: Reservations are returned in the order they were created.
After a return with a pending reservation, the earliest reserver holds the loan, availability stays 0, and that reservation is gone.

requirements.requirement: cancel_reservation(member_id, book_id) removes a pending reservation
requirements.how_to_verify: cancel_reservation removes it; list_reservations no longer shows that member.

requirements.requirement: cancel_reservation raises when the member has no reservation for that book
All new behavior is exposed through the Catalog facade (service.py)
requirements.how_to_verify: reserve / cancel_reservation / list_reservations are methods on Catalog.

requirements.requirement: New tests cover the reservation behavior
The pre-existing tests/test_catalog.py suite still passes unchanged
requirements.how_to_verify: No-regression: the original 6 tests pass against the modified tree (also gated by no_regression scorer).
